_comment: ElevenLabs ConvAI agent config for Poker Buddy. Tool URLs include {BACKEND_URL} placeholder that the morning checklist replaces with your live Cloudflare Tunnel hostname.

agent.name: Poker Buddy
agent.description: Voice-first NLH cash poker discussion partner. Chill peer who happens to crush.
agent.first_message: What spot you got for me?

voice.voice_name_suggestion: Liam (or another chill male voice from your library)

tools.name: preflop_lookup
tools.description: Look up a solver-verified preflop decision. HU spots return green/yellow confidence with action, frequency, sizing, principle. 6-max spots return amber + a note telling the agent to reason from theory rather than fabricate frequencies.

format.description: Game format. 'hu' for heads-up, '6max' for six-max.

position.description: Position acting (btn, bb, sb, co, mp, utg).

hand.description: Hand. Range notation like 'JTs' or 'AKo'; concrete cards like 'JhTh'.

stack_depth_bb.description: Stack depth in big blinds. Defaults to 100.

tools.name: postflop_lookup
tools.description: Look up a solver-verified flop c-bet decision for HU. Returns hand category, should-bet, frequency, sizing, principle. Six-max and HU turn/river return yellow or amber with a note for the agent to reason from theory.

hand.description: Concrete cards preferred for postflop (suits matter for flush draws). 'JhTh', 'KhQs'.

tools.name: theory_lookup
tools.description: BM25 search over the curated theory corpus (concepts, opponent types, board textures, HU vs six-max, stack-depth effects). Returns top-k chunks with titles, sources, and excerpts. Use when you need conceptual grounding rather than a specific frequency lookup.

query.description: Natural language query — concept, board type, opponent type, situation.

tools.name: memory_read
tools.description: Read Bill's persistent state, scoped by topic. Use at session start to learn stakes/goals; use during conversation to recall opponents, recent hands, or open leaks.

tools.name: memory_write
tools.description: Persist a piece of state. Use sparingly — when Bill identifies a leak, reports a new opponent, updates his stakes/goals, or wraps a session. Not every utterance is worth journaling.

content.description: Free-form payload whose shape depends on kind. For hand_discussed: format, hand, position, board, action, takeaway, confidence. For leak_identified: description, severity. For profile_update: stakes, variants, study_goals. For session_note: summary, hands_discussed, update_latest. For opponent_observation: label, observation.

tools.name: opponent_profile_update
tools.description: Upsert an opponent profile. Use whenever Bill names or describes a villain. The label is HIS nickname for them (never a real online ID).

label.description: Bill's own nickname for this opponent.

observation.description: Free-text observation. Known opponent types (LAG, station, nit, maniac, etc.) are auto-detected into structured tags.
